title: Chapter 6
content:

Kai could feel her resistance building. His "Eye of Lust" could practically see the tension in her muscles. She was on the verge of snapping out of the haze, of realizing the absurdity of a neighbor boy groping her in her own kitchen.

I’m losing her,

My Charisma is too low. If she wakes up from this lust-daze now, she’ll slap me and kick me out. I need to escalate. I need to break her logic.

[Ding!]

[Shop Accessed]

The blue screen overlaid his vision, invisible to the flushing woman in his arms.

[Host Charisma is insufficient for higher-level seduction maneuvers.]

[Recommendation: Consumable Item.]

[Item: The Serpent’s Tongue (One-Time Use Scroll)]

[Description: Imbues the user’s voice with a hypnotic, persuasive cadence for 60 seconds. Targets with low mental resistance or high arousal will be compelled to agree to reasonable requests.]

[Purchase Successful. -50 XP.]

[Skill Activated: The Serpent’s Tongue.]

He stopped his hands. Mrs. Lin blinked, taking a breath to speak, likely to tell him to stop.

"Mrs. Lin," Kai interrupted, his voice resonating with a unnatural, velvety depth. It wasn’t just sound; it was a frequency that bypassed the ears and vibrated directly in the brain. Yes... sticky... wasted...

"Let me clean you," Kai commanded softly. "Let me drink it off you."

Mrs. Lin’s eyes glazed over. Her grip on his shoulders tightened, not pushing him away, but bracing herself.

"O-Okay..." she whispered, her voice barely audible. "Just... make me clean."

Kai didn’t hesitate.

He dropped to his knees.

[Ding!]

[Hidden Quest Completed: Beginner’s Feast (Boob Play)]

[Criteria Met: Oral Stimulation, Nipple Hardening, Target Moaning.]

Kai wiped his mouth with the back of his hand, a satisfied smirk playing on his lips. He stood up slowly, towering over the slumped, breathless form of Mrs. Lin.

She looked wrecked. Her robe was wide open, her chest exposed and ravaged, her face a deep crimson. She couldn’t meet his eyes. She pulled the lapels of her robe together with trembling hands, covering her sensitive chest, though the fabric chafing against her over-stimulated nipples made her wince.

"There," Kai said, his voice returning to normal, though still husky. "All clean, Mrs. Lin. Not a drop wasted."

Mrs. Lin leaned against the counter, her legs too weak to support her fully. She looked at him through her lashes, her eyes swimming with embarrassment and a lingering, confused lust.

"You..." She swallowed hard, her voice raspy. "You... didn’t have to do that... Kai."

She took a shaky breath. "But... thank you. You are... very sweet to help me."

She bit her lip, the memory of his tongue clearly replaying in her mind. She wasn’t angry. She was addicted

"You’re welcome, Auntie Lin," Kai said, stepping back toward the door. He knew when to leave. Leave them wanting more. "I should get going. I can’t be late for the Academy."

He turned and walked out, leaving the door slightly ajar.

Mrs. Lin stood alone in the kitchen, clutching her robe to her chest. She brought her hand up to her mouth, touching her lips, before slowly sliding her hand down to cup her own breast, squeezing the spot where his mouth had been.
